prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Trace how Java bytecode is JIT-compiled in openjdk/jdk. Find C++ source files implementing: the CompileBroker request, the C2 compiler compilation entry point, the bytecode-to-ideal-graph conversion, and the code installation into the code cache.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the java-platform fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Trace how Java bytecode is JIT-compiled in openjdk/jdk. Find C++ source files implementing: the CompileBroker request, the C2 compiler compilation entry point, the bytecode-to-ideal-graph conversion, and the code installation into the code cache.
